meaning: n.(歌剧、音乐剧等的)歌词(或剧本)
examples: Or something along the lines of the dual-screen Toshiba Libretto?
The screen is much bigger than the libretto and comes with custom software. this.
I do not claim that our libretto was good poetry but it served as a vehicle for the tunes.
In crafting her libretto, Ms. Moshiri distilled the tale into six brief scenes with five characters.
The libretto reads like the dramas of Friedrich Schiller, a poet in love with the categorical imperative.
